hero.desc: From enterprise applications and SaaS platforms to AI-powered analytics and automation systems.

about.text: IMFSYS is a software engineering and AI solutions company helping startups and enterprises build scalable digital products, intelligent analytics platforms and automation systems. Our team brings experience from banking, logistics, fintech, blockchain, education and SaaS products used by thousands of users.

bi.desc: Connect your databases, CRM, ERP and operational systems to AI-powered analytics. Get executive dashboards, business insights, forecasting and natural-language reporting.

aiAnalytics.title: Turn Your Company Data Into Business Decisions
intro: Very few companies actually use it.
aiAnalytics.connect: Our AI Analytics Agent connects directly to your databases, ERP, CRM, accounting systems, spreadsheets, and APIs to analyze business performance in real time.
aiAnalytics.ask: Instead of manually building reports, simply ask:
questions: Why did sales decrease last month?
Which customers generate the highest profit?

faq.desc: Clear answers for companies planning software, AI analytics or system integration projects.

items.q: How much does a project cost?
items.a: Cost depends on scope, integrations, team size and timeline. After a short discovery call, we prepare a practical estimate with milestones.
Small MVPs can take weeks, while enterprise platforms usually require several months. We define phases so you can launch value early.

items.q: Can you work with an existing product?
items.a: Yes. We can audit the current codebase, stabilize it, add new features, improve architecture or take over long-term development.

items.q: Do you provide support after launch?
items.a: Yes. We support monitoring, bug fixes, feature improvements, infrastructure, integrations and product scaling after release.
Yes. We build AI analytics agents, automation tools, chatbots, document intelligence, recommendation systems and AI product features.

items.q: Can you integrate with our existing systems?
items.a: Yes. We integrate with databases, ERP, CRM, accounting systems, payment providers, internal APIs and third-party platforms.

cta.desc: Ready to take the next step? Join us now and start transforming your vision into reality with expert support.
